tell me about ayushman?:
Ayushman is a Data Scientist who specializes in building data-driven systems and applying mathematics, statistics, and AI to solve real-world problems.

His academic background includes:
*   An M.Sc in Data Science from Chennai Mathematical Institute (2024 - 2026) with a CGPA of 9.19.
*   A BMaths. (Hons.) from Indian Statistical Institute (2020 - 2024).

Ayushman's interests lie in areas such as Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling, Graph Theory, and Agentic AI systems. He is particularly focused on designing intelligent systems that transform complex data into meaningful insights. Recently, he has been exploring the intersection of quantitative finance and machine learning, with an emphasis on time series modeling, portfolio optimization, and statistical arbitrage.

His core competencies and skills include:
*   **Artificial Intelligence & LLM Systems**: Transformers, LLMs, AI Agents, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, LangGraph, Vector Databases.
*   **Programming & Technical Tools**: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly), R, SQL, LaTeX.
*   **Quantitative Finance**: Statistical Arbitrage, Portfolio Optimization, Credit & Market Risk Modeling, Financial Econometrics.
*   **Machine Learning & Deep Learning**: Supervised/Unsupervised Learning, Recommendation Systems, ANN, CNN, PyTorch, TensorFlow.
*   **MLOps & ML Systems**: DVC, MLflow, Model Deployment, Experiment Tracking, Flask, Docker.
*   **Data Analytics & Visualization**: EDA, Statistical Analysis, Pandas, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI.

show me ayushman's latest projects:
Ayushman's latest projects include:

*   **Quantitative Market Regime Clustering using Return and Volatility**
    *   **Date:** May 2026
    *   **Summary:** Developed a quantitative finance project that clusters financial assets based on return characteristics and volatility behavior using unsupervised machine learning. It aimed to identify hidden market regimes and group NSE stocks with similar financial behavior for portfolio analysis and risk assessment, utilizing KMeans, Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM), and PCA.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Used:** Python, Quantitative Finance, Unsupervised Learning, KMeans Clustering, Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM), PCA, Financial Data Analysis, Risk Analysis, Time Series Analysis
    *   **GitHub Link:** https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Quantitative-Market-Regime-Clustering-using-Return-and-Volatility

*   **Applied Machine Learning (AML) – Projects**
    *   **Date:** January 2026 – April 2026
    *   **Summary:** A series of assignments focused on building end-to-end machine learning systems, emphasizing reproducibility, experiment tracking, model serving, and deployment using MLOps practices. This included an SMS spam classification pipeline and transfer learning with CNN and transformer-based models.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Used:** Machine Learning, Spam Classification, DVC (Data Version Control), MLflow, Flask, Docker, PyTest, Transfer Learning, CNN, Transformers, Model Deployment, Experiment Tracking, Git
    *   **GitHub Link:** https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Applied_Machine_Learning

*   **LectureAI – Personal Lecture Assistant**
    *   **Date:** April 2026
    *   **Summary:** Conceptualized and developed a smart Agentic-AI framework called "LectureAI" to convert standard lectures into interactive experiences. This application features a context-aware chatbot, timestamp-based video navigation, automated summaries, mind maps, word clouds, and MCQ-based assessments. It uses LangGraph and RAG pipelines, integrated with tools like Gemini, Groq, Whisper, and Tavily.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Used:** LangGraph, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), Gemini, Groq, Whisper, FAISS Database, Flask, Agentic AI, API Integration, HTML/JS
    *   **GitHub Link:** https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/LectureAI_-_Personal_Lecture_Assistant

*   **Time Series Forecasting for Gold Futures**
    *   **Date:** March 2026 – April 2026
    *   **Summary:** Explored challenges of forecasting financial data by applying time series analysis techniques to gold futures, focusing on trend, seasonality, and volatility patterns. The project built an end-to-end forecasting pipeline, implementing models such as ARIMA, Holt-Winters, GARCH, Random Forest, and XGBoost.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Used:** Time Series Analysis, ARIMA, GARCH, Exponential Smoothing, Random Forest, XGBoost
    *   **GitHub Link:** https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Time_Series_Forecasting_for_Gold_Futures

show me his work experience/internships?:
Ayushman has experience through an Industry Project and several internships:

*   **Industry Project: Trading Strategy Researcher**
    *   **Institute:** Under Prantik Biswas – Quantitative Investment Strategist (AVP) at HSBC
    *   **Duration:** August 2025 - November 2025
    *   **Description:** As part of his Industry Project at Chennai Mathematical Institute, Ayushman worked under the supervision of Prantik Biswas on quantitative trading research for Indian equity markets. The project focused on developing data-driven methods for short-term market analysis and portfolio decision-making using machine learning and statistical techniques. This involved time-series forecasting models (LSTM) for price movements, algorithms to identify technical support and resistance levels, and extending asset-level predictions to portfolio construction using a mean-variance optimization framework.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Learned:** Quantitative Finance, Time Series Forecasting, LSTM, XGBoost, Portfolio Optimization, Mean-Variance Optimization, Financial Data Analysis

*   **Internship: AI Agent Development Intern**
    *   **Institute:** Algo Labs
    *   **Duration:** May 2025 - July 2025
    *   **Description:** Ayushman designed and developed advanced Agentic AI systems to automate complex, repetitive workflows, replacing slow manual data processes with scalable, self-operating solutions. He built "Lecture-AI", an intelligent learning platform for interactive lecture experiences with personalized chatbot support, mind maps, notes, and adaptive learning materials. He leveraged LangGraph for orchestration and implemented RAG pipelines for deep contextual understanding, integrating multiple APIs for seamless data extraction and content generation.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Learned:** Agentic AI, LangGraph, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), Multi-Agent Systems, API Integrations, Task Automation, Databases

*   **Internship: Data Scientist Intern**
    *   **Institute:** COTHON SOLUTIONS
    *   **Duration:** December 2024
    *   **Description:** During this internship, Ayushman worked on multiple real-world machine learning projects across customer segmentation, e-commerce, and healthcare. He developed customer segmentation models using K-Means clustering, built e-commerce recommendation systems (Content-Based and Collaborative Filtering), and designed predictive models for heart risk assessment. Rigorous evaluations were performed using metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and RMSE to ensure model robustness.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Learned:** Python, Machine Learning, K-Means Clustering, Content-Based Filtering, Collaborative Filtering, Heart Risk Prediction, Model Evaluation (Accuracy, Precision, Recall, RMSE), Data Analysis, Business Analytics

*   **Internship: Finance and Stock Market Internship - Trainee**
    *   **Institute:** CAPITAL VISION INVESTMENT
    *   **Duration:** November 2024 - December 2024
    *   **Description:** Ayushman gained practical experience in financial investment strategies, portfolio management, and equity selection. He assisted in evaluating and managing investment portfolios and assessing associated risks. He built a strong foundation in various financial instruments, including mutual funds, National Pension System (NPS), fixed deposits, and tax-efficient investment options, understanding the practical aspects of financial markets, asset allocation, and wealth management.
    *   **Skills and Technologies Learned:** Portfolio Management, Risk Assessment, Equity Selection, Mutual Funds, National Pension System (NPS), Fixed Deposits, Tax-efficient Investments, Financial Markets, Wealth Management

tell me about his lastest work experienc:
Ayushman's latest work experience is an Industry Project as a Trading Strategy Researcher:

*   **Role**: Trading Strategy Researcher
*   **Organization**: Under Prantik Biswas – Quantitative Investment Strategist (AVP) at HSBC
*   **Duration**: August 2025 - November 2025
*   **Description**:
    *   Ayushman worked on quantitative trading research for Indian equity markets as part of his Industry Project at Chennai Mathematical Institute, focusing on data-driven methods for short-term market analysis and portfolio decision-making using machine learning and statistical techniques.
    *   The project involved three key research components:
        *   Developed time-series forecasting models using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks to predict short-term price movements of major indices and stocks from the NIFTY 50 universe.
        *   Developed algorithms to identify technical support and resistance levels from historical price data by analyzing local extrema and clustering significant price points.
        *   Extended asset-level predictions to portfolio construction by implementing a portfolio optimization framework, using predicted returns as expected returns and dynamically estimating risk with rolling covariance matrices, applying Mean-Variance Optimization to construct portfolios that maximize the Sharpe ratio.
*   **Skills and Technologies Learnt**: Quantitative Finance, Time Series Forecasting, LSTM, XGBoost, Portfolio Optimization, Mean-Variance Optimization, Financial Data Analysis
